hero.headline: Storm-Tested Roofing — *Built for Florida's Fiercest Weather*
hero.subheadline: From hurricane prep to emergency repairs, we've protected Tampa Bay homes for 25+ years with our industry-leading warranty.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Roofing Solutions
services_section.subheading: From routine maintenance to hurricane recovery — we handle every roofing challenge

services.title: Storm Damage Restoration
services.description: 24/7 emergency response for hurricane and wind damage. Insurance claim assistance included with detailed documentation and direct billing options.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Advanced thermal imaging and moisture detection to find hidden leaks before they cause structural damage. Same-day emergency repairs available.

services.title: Preventive Maintenance
services.description: Quarterly inspections and tune-ups to extend roof life. Includes gutter cleaning, seal replacement, and detailed condition reports.

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: Full tear-off and installation with hurricane-rated materials. GAF Master Elite certification ensures premium workmanship and extended warranties.

about.heading: Protecting Tampa Bay Since 1998
about.body: We've weathered every major storm that's hit Tampa Bay — from Charley to Ian. Our team knows Florida roofing inside and out, using only hurricane-rated materials and proven installation techniques. Every job comes with our 25-year warranty because we build roofs that last.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Called them after Hurricane Ian damaged our tile roof. They had tarps up within 4 hours and completed the full repair in 3 days. Insurance approved everything thanks to their detailed photos and reports.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Found a leak in our master bedroom during heavy rains. Their thermal imaging located the exact problem area in the valley. Fixed it properly the first time - no more stains on our ceiling.

reviews.name: Jennifer R.
reviews.text: Replaced our entire shingle roof last year. The crew was professional, cleaned up perfectly every day, and finished ahead of schedule. The 25-year warranty gave us great peace of mind.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Emergency storm response available 24/7 throughout our service area

cta.heading: Get Your Free Roof Assessment
cta.body: Don't wait for the next storm. Our certified inspectors will evaluate your roof's condition and provide a detailed report with photos — completely free.
